description_long: This object is a cylindrical barrel or bucket with a smooth, slightly tapered form and a rounded top edge. The exterior is a gradient brown color, darker at the base and lighter towards the top, giving it a subtle, shaded appearance. Two thin, dark side handles are attached near the lower half, suggesting it can be lifted or carried. The surface appears to be made of plastic or a similar synthetic material, with no visible seams, bands, or reinforcements. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior. The top is open, indicating it is designed to function as a receptacle for holding or transporting materials.
description: A smooth, brown cylindrical barrel or bucket with two thin side handles and an open top, made of plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top and both thin, dark side handles attached near the base.
description_view_1: Side view with one handle visible protruding to the left, highlighting the smooth cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view with no handles visible, showing the uninterrupted smooth surface of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with one handle visible protruding to the right, similar to view 1.
